note: Source of truth for permissions. Edit this file; run `python .agent/tools/permissions_render.py` to regenerate permissions.md and adapter deny rules. Humans edit, agents never do.
always_allowed: Read any file in the project directory.
Read public HTTP APIs in the approved domains list.
requires_approval: Install new dependencies or upgrade pinned versions.

never_allowed.rule: Force push to main, production, or staging.
Access secrets or credentials directly (use env vars through the shell only).
Send HTTP requests to domains not on the approved list.
Modify permissions.json or permissions.md (only humans edit these).
Delete entries from episodic or semantic memory (archive, don't delete).
